series_metadata.series_description: Files contain original application form; examiniation results; continuing education certificates; and miscellaneous correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Update and maintain these records on the AS/400 computer database system for 50 years ; Microform: Retain updated master in appropriate storage facility for 50 years. Retain updated master diazo in operating area for 50 years ; Paper: Retain hard copy in operating area until records become inactive, then microfilm. After microfilm has been checked for quality and completeness, then destroy hard copy records, Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Wastepaper ; Paper: Wastepaper
